steps.title: Name the sentence function
steps.content: The underlined sentence explains what reduplication is: a root element is repeated, sometimes with modification, inside a related word. It turns the opening Nuxalk example into a general linguistic concept.

steps.title: Separate definition from details
steps.content: Choice A refers to where Nuxalk is from, which appears outside the underlined sentence. Choice B refers to translations of Nuxalk words. Choice C invents a comparison with other languages. The underlined sentence defines the phenomenon itself. The answer is D.
